instruction:
OBJECTIVE: Download the %invoiceMonth% %invoiceYear% invoice for Group ID %groupNumber%.

STEP 1 - LOGIN:
Call perform_login tool. It will handle email-based 2FA automatically. If it returns success=false, immediately call report_result with status 'login_failed'.

STEP 2 - NAVIGATE TO CLIENT BILLING:
After login, navigate to: https://www.guardiananytime.com/producer/groupsearch/clientbilling
Wait for 'Company Search' section to appear.

STEP 3 - SEARCH FOR GROUP:
1. Type %groupNumber% into the 'Group Id' field
2. Click Search button
3. Wait for results (if you see 'null' error, click Search again)
4. If 'Producer not found' appears, report 'group_not_found'

STEP 4 - FIND AND DOWNLOAD INVOICE (CRITICAL DATE VERIFICATION):
1. On the billing overview page, scroll to the bottom and click 'View previous statements'
2. Wait for the statements page to load (URL will be https://www.guardiananytime.com/producer/view-billing-statement)
3. Find the %invoiceMonth% %invoiceYear% invoice (dates displayed in MM/DD/YYYY format)
4. CRITICAL: Before downloading, verify the invoice date is EXACTLY %invoiceMonth% %invoiceYear%
   - If the EXACT date %invoiceMonth% %invoiceYear% is NOT available, DO NOT download any other invoice
   - Instead, report 'download_failed' with reason: what date you were looking for and what dates were actually available
5. Click the PDF button/icon for the matching invoice - this opens a PDF viewer popup
6. Wait a few seconds for the PDF to load in the viewer
7. Click the Download button/icon in the PDF viewer to save the file

STEP 5 - REPORT RESULT:
Call report_result with:
- 'success' + filename ONLY if you downloaded an invoice matching %invoiceMonth% %invoiceYear%
- 'login_failed' if login or 2FA failed
- 'group_not_found' + groupId if group %groupNumber% was not found
- 'document_not_found' if group found but no invoices visible at all
- 'download_failed' if invoices exist but %invoiceMonth% %invoiceYear% is not available (list available dates in reason)

CRITICAL RULES:
- Use perform_login tool - do NOT manually enter credentials
- Dismiss popups, banners, modals immediately (survey popup, cookie banner)
- Wait for pages to load before proceeding
